dialogue_text: Follow me and I will show you your room.
source_excerpt: The soldier now blew upon a green whistle, and at once a young girl, dressed in a pretty green silk gown, entered the room. She had lovely green hair and green eyes, and she bowed low before Dorothy as she said, "Follow me and I will sho...

speaker.notes: Matched speaker phrase 'Dorothy as she' to 'dorothy'.
